item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Posting this again for awareness
item.description: https://antifreeze.app/ "But here's the thing. When you Google "ICE tracking app" or "ICE sighting alerts," AntiFreeze doesn't show up. The entire first page is articles about ICEBlock, which doesn't even exist anymore. The app Apple killed is still dominating search results, and the one that was specifically built to survive exactly what happened to ICEBlock is invisible. I'm not asking for money. The app is free. I don't run ads. I don't collect data. I built this because the tools communities were relying on had a single point of failure, and that failure happened exactly the way everyone should have expected it to. What I am asking is that people know this exists. Share the link. Tell your local immigrant rights organizations. Tell your rapid response networks. Tell anyone who used to rely on ICEBlock and thinks there's nothing left." https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2026/3/20/2374166/-I-built-an-ICE-tracking-app-that-can-t-be-pulled-from-the-App-Store-Because-it-was-never-in-one
item.dc:creator: azazyel

item.description: A “dictatorship of capital” describes our current state perfectly.

item.title: Murderer.
item.description:
The difference of a socialist and a moderate corporation Democrat.
Fox News & Co try to dehumanize the people. His name was Joan Sebastian Guerrero. - He was here legally. - He was authorized to work. - He had Social Security Number. - He was NOT target of ICE investigation. - He did NOT try to kill ICE agents.
They are going to keep murdering people if they don’t believe there will be repercussions.
You can help stopping them! Take action by visiting https://icerr.com/. Select your state to find a local organization near you. These groups have 'ICE Response Teams' that text or call you when agents are in the city, allowing you to document and film their activities. They are also looking for volunteers to conduct active patrols to locate ICE agents, or to call a hotline to warn others if you happen to stumble across them. At least get the hotline number.
item.dc:creator: onushka

item.title: They just continue killing people....
item.description: and he wasn't even the target.

item.title: Dump of more positive satisfying things. Enjoy, be happy.
item.description:
A wheelchair accessible carousel.
A tea house in China.
Apple blossom tea in Japan
thought I’d seen everything...
Didn’t Know Competitive Zero-Turn Lawnmower Driving Existed Until Today ...
Spotted this absolute monster in Kyiv, Ukraine. What am I even looking at ?
I love it !
Pretty neat. No, I don't sell anything, I just show ideas. Make them better and you get money.
1920s baby stroller...
Is this what we call teamwork ?
Gannets diving for fish in Newfoundland, Canada.
The pigeon being fed its medication
Laptop’ from 1986. Came with a printer ...
Tattoo remove with q-switch laser.
Simple Adult Happiness.
16 Seconds of Pure Satisfaction.
Handcrafting a giant Lego Pokémon minifigure from scratch.
1980s Japanese Marketing Was a Pure Masterpiece !
Never throw away your offcuts, they might be the key to a flawless corner. ?
Who's hungry ?
Elastic energy -_ kinetic energy -_ loading a big tire onto a truck with ease.
Ladybug takeoff in slowmo.
Taking a little seat ...
Excavating clay soil.
Death Valley National Park's First Major Superbloom in a Decade.
Survival Mode ...
Army ants build bridge to invade wasp nest.
Earth's rotation captured by a stabilized camera. the milky way on the right.
This guy is amazing !
Check if it's time to flip the steaks.
item.dc:creator: TerribleBot

item.title: 21 nice and wholesome things to brighten your day, vol 311
item.description:
A Bee Fell Asleep in my Sunflower ~u/DrDrillbit
There's been a few bees I recognize that love my one bloomed sunflower. They're having a field day and one even slept in the flower overnight - pictured. I can't wait to see how they react when the others bloom. ~u/DrDrillbit
~u/saky12
~u/Cmmonbro

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1747² (beaver aerodynamics)
item.description:
Lets get this bread
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "[kiss noises] What doing? Why thank you! What doing?" ____ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: GovBrief Today #529
item.description: ICE agents killed the wrong man this morning in Biddeford, Maine, and left his body handcuffed in the street for five hours. Joan Sebastian Guerrero was 26, married, with a 3-year-old daughter. Agents staking out an address on his street rammed his car as he left for work and fired up to seven shots, four of them through his windshield. It took the DHS Secretary until nightfall to admit they had the wrong man. Six days earlier in Houston, agents killed Lorenzo Salgado Araujo, who was the wrong man too. Biddeford knew where to take its grief. By noon, several hundred people had marched down Main Street to Sen. Susan Collins' office, where some pushed into the entryway, pounding on her locked doors and chanting vote her out. Collins cast the deciding vote last month to award ICE $70 billion that runs through the end of Trump's term, and her office answered the protest by pointing to the accountability measures in the bill. The agents who killed Guerrero and Salgado Araujo were not wearing the cameras that accountability promised. I've emailed 8,213 stories over 529 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260713-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/patricipation-trophy [2] https://go.govbrief.today/cuba-visit [3] https://go.govbrief.today/rubio-icc [4] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-july13 [5] https://go.govbrief.today/cyclo-greens [6] https://go.govbrief.today/utah-monuments [7] https://go.govbrief.today/doj-defense-leaks [8] https://go.govbrief.today/immigrants-credit [9] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-improper-purpose [10] https://go.govbrief.today/mpls-evidence [11] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-maine-shooting [12] https://go.govbrief.today/dhs-hack [13] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-sterling-health [14] https://go.govbrief.today/mcconnell-graham [15] https://go.govbrief.today/forest-rto [16] https://go.govbrief.today/biddeford-protests [17] https://go.govbrief.today/hostile-architecture [18] https://go.govbrief.today/states-paramount Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: First attempt at disguising myself with body paint - MCroft07
item.description: I've truly never done this before and it was really hard. Since I had to keep moving and realigning myself (which was really confusing) I chose to screenshot it without me in the frame and overlay that so I could realign myself easier each time I looked down to the mirror, that's why there is a ghosted effect. https://linktr.ee/mcroft07 if you want to see more because I don't post much here since I don't want to spam
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: Today, we watched the world burn..and ruined our relationship with our family.
item.description:
Yes, I call @FrothyStout (my husband) "Mr. Bay." Shut up. Gram is his mother.
I stayed out of this for a while, but the check had been mailed to my husband. He deposited it and put it away into savings to get us tf out of Texas which we only moved to to be closer to his mother (Gram) and his father (Papa) who have recently confirmed are retiring and moving soon after they retire. Recently, Gram (MIL) made a point to boast about having officially crossed over into millionaire status. Shortly after, she found money they had forgotten long enough for it to be considered "abandoned"
I finally cracked and became defensive angy wife (only AFTER reading the message to my husband before sending it, because I respect boundaries and shit)
Then we went HOURS without a response. Suddenly: a PDF reply?
His FATHER responded WITH A PDF. Turns out the money is his? Also certain his wife wrote the document since it began by saying [my wife's name] in the first red dash...but later lists [father's name] in third person as the "account holder" For context: Mississippi is where we were stationed when we were still active duty. Legally? No. The account was my husband's name after crossing "abandoned" status..but it was $6,000 we didn't have before and $6,000 we can continue to not have now...although it did make our "get tf outta texas savings" look nice for a couple seconds. Now, I just hope every dollar they spend out of that account reminds them of how important this forgotten account was to them.
So, husband went a little nuclear
We made the mistake of getting drunk with Nana (MIL's mother) who informed us that MIL cheated on his father earlier in his childhood. They split up for a year while his mom told the kids that she was upset their father worked too much and didn't make enough time for the family. Husband was also a squirmy one with too many feelings, so she "drugged him up" with Ritalin then drugged him down with blood pressure medication so he could sleep at night. He put up with gaslighting and manipulation for his whole life..and reasonably finally cracked.
It was the cold, corporate, Chat GPT written PDF claiming "unconditional love" while simultaneously itemizing every transaction of their "love" over the past decade that finally did it. That was my husband's final straw, and I'm just trying to support him while also showing him that he isn't the crazy one in this family. Your comments help bring that clarity to light. They have always made him out to be the villain.
The "Papa Murphy's throne" is a reference to husband's ex from 16 years ago who cheated on him before he joined the military and met me. Her father purchased her a local Papa Murphy's franchise. His mother kept tabs on her through social media and...pizza purchases and even informed us recently that she purchased her own house! Because his mother is the type to hold onto her son's ex lover for 16 years hoping maybe one day he'll come to his senses and leave the white trash meme lord Bottom he wound up marrying. So, we have the $6,000 on it's way back to its rightful owners. We still have 11 months to save up to get tf out of Texas.
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) watching us burn the world down...and i guess divorce our parents for good. >:(
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

This is me sharing my art here because I love doing that with the community :D
